projects.title: ArbiTrac
projects.description: A Flutter app that identifies sportsbook arbitrage opportunities, validates stake splits, and helps bettors monitor live lines with precision-safe calculations.
highlights: Supports moneyline, spreads, totals, and outright markets
Includes a manual arbitrage calculator for decimal and American odds
Uses Decimal and Rational math utilities for reliable stake and payout calculations
Provides event detail drill-down, search, and local watchlist persistence

projects.title: Monte-Carlo-Pricer
projects.description: A high-performance Rust option pricer that uses Monte Carlo simulation with GBM paths, antithetic variates, and parallel execution for efficient pricing.
highlights: Prices European call and put options with stochastic simulation
Implements antithetic variates to reduce variance and stabilize estimates
Leverages Rayon for multicore parallel path generation
